events.title: US Navy to Blockade Iranian Ports
events.desc: The U.S. military announced it will implement a blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports starting April 13, after President Trump ordered a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. This move escalates tensions following the failure of recent peace talks with Iran.

events.title: Oil Prices Surge on Blockade Threat
events.desc: Asian stocks fell and oil prices surged past $103 a barrel following the US announcement of a blockade of Iranian ports and the Strait of Hormuz, injecting fresh turmoil into financial markets.

events.title: Iran's Guards Warn of Ceasefire Violation
events.desc: Iran's Revolutionary Guards stated that any military vessels approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be considered a violation of the U.S. ceasefire and will be dealt with harshly. They asserted control over the strait for non-military passage.

events.title: US Intercepts Vessels in International Waters
events.desc: President Trump announced that the US Navy would immediately blockade the Strait of Hormuz and interdict any vessel in international waters that had paid tolls to Iran, following the collapse of peace talks.

events.title: Saudi Arabia Summons Iraq Envoy Over Drone Threats
events.desc: Saudi Arabia summoned Iraq's ambassador due to threats against the kingdom and other Gulf states originating from drones launched within Iraqi territory. Riyadh emphasized Iraq's responsibility in managing these threats.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Kill Dozens in Lebanon Amidst Ceasefire Concerns
events.desc: Hours after a US-Iran ceasefire announcement, Israel launched a large wave of strikes across Lebanon, hitting Beirut's southern suburbs, southern Lebanon, and the eastern Bekaa Valley, resulting in at least 182 fatalities and hundreds wounded.

events.title: Israeli Air Strike Kills Infant in South Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed an infant sister and other relatives of a family attending a funeral. A Lebanese Red Cross paramedic was also reportedly killed by an Israeli drone while on a humanitarian mission.

events.title: Iran's Asymmetric Counterair Campaign Continues
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging KC-135 tankers, continuing a pattern of asymmetric attacks aimed at U.S. air assets.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Iran Imposes Internet Blackout During Strikes
events.desc: During coordinated strikes by adversaries on military installations, the Iranian government imposed a near-total internet blackout, deliberately dismantling communications infrastructure to suppress information flow to its own people.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Nearly 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords, including those for ministries involved in sensitive work, were found circulating online, exposing significant security vulnerabilities.

events.title: Iranian Propaganda Uses AI for Viral Content
events.desc: Sophisticated, viral AI-generated Lego-style videos are being used as powerful propaganda by Iran, described by experts as significantly impactful and designed to bypass traditional detection methods.

events.title: US Deploys Mines Over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the U.S. deployed Gator Scatterable Mine systems over the Iranian village of Kafari, resulting in multiple fatalities, matching weapons previously used by U.S. forces.

events.title: Iran Strikes IRGC Compound and School
events.desc: Verified videos confirm two waves of missile strikes on an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran, detailing multiple impacts on the complex.

events.title: UAE Downplays Iranian Strikes
events.desc: Authorities in the United Arab Emirates have reportedly downplayed damage and mischaracterized interceptions of Iranian drone strikes, with public accounts not aligning with open-source observations.

events.title: French Nuclear Deterrence Doctrine Shift
events.desc: French President Macron announced a new 'forward deterrence' doctrine, proposing the deployment of French Strategic Air Forces to allied European countries, similar to NATO's nuclear-sharing arrangements.
